ogTitle: Andrews vs Andrews Farm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Andrews and Andrews Farm.
heading: Andrews vs Andrews Farm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Andrews, South Australia and Andrews Farm, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Andrews Farm (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Andrews or Andrews Farm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Andrews has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Andrews Farm scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Andrews scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Andrews Farm scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Andrews or Andrews Farm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
